introduction.name: Introduction to NetEye
introduction.abstract: Build your solution for unified monitoring of your infrastructure

monitoring-intended-use.name: Monitoring
monitoring-intended-use.abstract: Keep under control your company's infrastructure on multiple levels

visualization.name: Visualization
visualization.abstract: View the status of your infrastructure in real-time

business-service-monitoring.name: Business Service Monitoring
business-service-monitoring.abstract: Observability of your business services depending on the state of every single part of your infrastructure

itoa.name: IT Operations Analytics
itoa.abstract: View collected performance data integrated into a time series database for data analytics

log-management-and-security.name: Log Management and Security
log-management-and-security.abstract: Collect and process logs to detect anomalies and threats

shutdown-manager.name: Shutdown Manager
shutdown-manager.abstract: Controlled shutdown of a large number of hosts in case of emergency

apm.name: Application Performance Monitoring
apm.abstract: Collect data about the performance of applications and monitor them in real-time

user-experience.name: User Experience
user-experience.abstract: Monitor real user data to optimize web performance and enhance user experience

service-management.name: Service Management
service-management.abstract: Manage the IT assets and services of the infrastructure, including Enterprise level

slm-and-reporting.name: Service Level Management and Reporting
slm-and-reporting.abstract: Create availability reports over a specified timeperiod and schedule their generation

introduction.name: Introduction to Core Modules
introduction.abstract: Modules that are shipped with the standard NetEye image build NetEye Core

director.name: Director
director.abstract: A single place to configure your monitoring environment

tornado.name: Tornado
tornado.abstract: Analyze data received from your devices, process and generate actions to be executed

neteye-self-monitoring.name: Neteye Self Monitoring
neteye-self-monitoring.abstract: Run health checks to monitor the health of NetEye itself

business-service-monitoring.name: Business Service Monitoring
business-service-monitoring.abstract: Manage your business services based on the state of every single part of your infrastructure

itoa.name: ITOA
itoa.abstract: Collect and compute data from network interfaces, applications and systems to present the result in a visual form

geo-maps.name: Geo Maps
geo-maps.abstract: Keep track of your hosts and host groups on customizable maps

nagvis.name: NagVis
nagvis.abstract: Interactive geographical maps to display the state of hosts and all their services

auditlog.name: Audit Log
auditlog.abstract: Look back at changes that have been made to NetEye

shutdown-manager.name: Shutdown Manager
shutdown-manager.abstract: Controlled shutdown of a large number of hosts in case of emergency

reporting.name: Reporting
reporting.abstract: Create host and service availability reports based on the monitoring database

alyvix.name: Visual Monitoring with Alyvix
alyvix.abstract: Monitor your Alyvix nodes by scheduling test cases in sessions on different Alyvix machines

elastic-stack.name: Elastic Stack
elastic-stack.abstract: Retrieve, search, analyze, and visualize data from any source

command-orchestrator.name: IT Operations (Command Orchestrator)
command-orchestrator.abstract: Execute predefined commands (also remotely) on hosts without having access to them

asset-management.name: Asset Management
asset-management.abstract: Advanced feature for inventory, asset and mobile devices management

slm.name: Service Level Management
slm.abstract: Setup contracts between an SLM customer and the service provider

satayo.name: Cyber Threat Intelligence - SATAYO
satayo.abstract: Scan your company for detecting vulnerabilities and potential risk of attacks

strategy.name: NetEye.Cloud Strategy
strategy.abstract: Cloud solution for unified monitoring of your network and infrastructure

cloud-monitoring.name: Monitoring Functional Area
cloud-monitoring.abstract: Cloud solution for unified monitoring of your network and infrastructure
